debug_info.goal:
case mk.cons
a : Type
bs : List a
n : a
ns : List a
ok :
  ((n :: ns).isEmpty = true → bs.isEmpty = true ∨ bs.length = 1) ∧
    (bs.isEmpty = true → (n :: ns).isEmpty = true ∨ (n :: ns).length = 1)
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have hr (s : SymList a) : s.reverse.fromSL = s.fromSL.reverse := by
        cases s; simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.reverse]
      have hi (l : List a) (x : a) : List.init (l ++ [x]) = l := by
        induction l with | nil => rfl | cons y ys ih => cases ys <;> simp [List.init, ih]
      simp [SymList.init, hr]
      cases bs with
      | nil =>
        cases ns with
        | nil => simp [SymList.tailSL, SymList.fromSL, List.init]
        | cons n' ns' => cases ok.2 rfl <;> contradiction
      | cons x xs =>
        simp [SymList.tailSL, SymList.check, SymList.fromSL, hr, hi, List.append_assoc]
